title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.070 - Notice to be recorded — appraisers appointed
text:
271.070.  Notice to be recorded — appraisers appointed. — The associate circuit judge shall file said affidavit and notice in his office, and cause the notice to be recorded on his stray book, and shall appoint three disinterested householders to view and appraise the property taken up.
(RSMo 1939 § 14504, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12830; 1919 § 4320; 1909 § 821 
Effective 1-02-79
